summary: The user is seeking book recommendations on sustainable living and environmental issues, expressing a growing interest in reading physical magazines and permaculture. They plan to take the Permaculture Design Course (PDC) Online first, dedicating 3-4 months to complete it before pursuing a Regenerative Agriculture Online Course.
facts: The user met up with an old friend at a bookstore three weeks ago and spent hours browsing the magazine section, purchasing several indie magazines. The user is particularly interested in the books "The Conscious Closet" and "Braiding Sweetgrass" to help make more sustainable choices in daily life. The user has about 3-4 months to dedicate to the Permaculture Design Course (PDC) Online, which requires around 120 hours to complete. The user is interested in learning more about permaculture and sustainable living. The user plans to start with the PDC course to gain foundational knowledge before taking the Regenerative Agriculture Online Course. The user enjoys flipping through indie magazines and is looking for suggestions on where to find more.
